title: Basic JavaScript Modules (ES6)
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Modules (ES6). Focus on implementing Named exports correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Modules (ES6)
description: Create a function that uses Named exports and Default exports together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Modules (ES6) Project
description: Build a small application that applies Named exports, Default exports, Named imports in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Modules (ES6)
description: The following code has bugs related to Named exports. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Modules (ES6)
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Named exports and Default exports.
